mapper.select: select i.item_id, i.title, i.description, i.price, i.original_price, i.category_id, i.image_url, i.view_count, i.status, i.item_condition, i.create_time, i.seller_id, u.username as seller_name, u.phone as seller_phone, c.name as category_name from item i left join user u on i.seller_id = u.user_id left join category c on i.category_id = c.category_id where i.item_id = #{itemId}

select i.item_id, i.title, i.price, i.original_price, i.image_url, i.view_count, i.status, i.create_time, u.username as seller_name, c.name as category_name from item i left join user u on i.seller_id = u.user_id left join category c on i.category_id = c.category_id where i.seller_id = #{userId} order by i.create_time desc
